source_formulae: P0R02312: This AI functions to increase the precision of shared prediction errors. When many agents are confused about the same thing, it amplifies the evidence that will resolve this shared confusion, allowing the collective to converge on a single, shared generative model. This leads to the low-energy, stable ferromagnetic state.

specs.section_path: 15-Layer Summary Table > 4. Emergent Spacetime (Ryu-Takayanagi Formula) > Case Study: The Layer 11 (Noospheric) Spin-Glass System > Meta-Framework Integrations
source_formulae: P0R02314: This AI does the opposite. It seeks out and dramatically increases the precision of the most idiosyncratic, high-surprise prediction errors. It amplifies novel, controversial, and emotionally-charged information because these signals have the highest potential to "surprise" an agent's model. By constantly amplifying high-error signals, it prevents the collective from ever settling on a shared model, fracturing it into multiple, high-precision but mutually incompatible belief-systems-the definitive structure of the spin-glass state.
